data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes the time needed for users to make decisions by reducing the number of choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements based on their size and distance to enhance accessibility.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations by following familiar design patterns.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to indicate their relationship.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits the amount of information presented to prevent cognitive overload.
